context_text: <A> yeah one of my roommates is uh from canada / <B> oh / <A> and they have thanksgiving also but they do it in october / <B> really / <A> a and i really think it's kinda funny because they don't really have a the story like with the pilgrims and everything i mean i i guess that's why they started celebrating thanksgiving it's probably the same reason that we do but it's just different because we put a lot of emphasis i think on the history behind it and everything and { she } / <B> [ mhm ] / <A> doesn't even really know the history behind canadian thanksgiving you know it's just kind of a nice time to give thanks and / <B> exactly
